commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh If I go forth into the field, then behold the slain with the sword. and if I enter into the city, then behold them that are sick with famine. yea, both the prophet and the priest go about into a land that they know not. Under Jechonias many were slain, and the chiefs carried into captivity, 4 Kings xxiv. Hebrew, "through the land, and are ignorant. "Chaldean, "they apply to their business, to earthly concerns, and care not "chap.
